projects.title: LIERAC
projects.description: A botanical journey into the heart of LIERAC's serum. We crafted a visual narrative around transparency, purity, and the living intelligence of plants.

projects.title: BA&SH
projects.description: Pieces that move. A social-first campaign celebrating freedom of expression through garments that live and breathe on screen.

projects.title: I KEPT MY NAME
projects.description: Identity as resistance. A film exploring what it means to hold onto yourself when the world tries to rename you.

projects.title: THE MAGIC IS
projects.description: The invisible made tangible. A campaign built around the sensation of transformation—before and after the moment that changes everything.

projects.title: STOP OVERTHINKING
projects.description: A manifesto in motion. Structured chaos, interrupted thoughts, and the beauty of letting go—translated into a visual language for a new generation.

projects.title: RED
projects.description: Paris at night, reimagined. A city that pulses with desire, tension, and color—captured in a campaign that refuses to be quiet.

projects.title: SO/PARIS
projects.description: Luxury hospitality seen through a new lens. An experience campaign that blurs the line between a hotel stay and a state of mind.
